sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108853" key="u(ponohth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπονο-ητής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n108853.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suspicious person,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Adam.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
